description_long: This is a thick, ornate book with a dark brown leather cover reinforced by large, angular black metal corner protectors. The front and back covers are adorned with symmetrical, geometric blue designs centered around a raised, black star-shaped emblem, giving it a mystical or arcane appearance. Two brown leather straps with black buttons secure the book closed along one edge, while the spine features matching blue circular motifs and is segmented by the straps. The pages are a light tan color and appear tightly bound, visible from the top and bottom views. The book's overall construction suggests durability and a sense of importance, possibly for ceremonial or magical use. No visible text or publisher markings are present, and the cover art is purely decorative and symbolic.
description: A thick, brown leather-bound book with black metal corners, blue geometric designs, and leather straps securing it closed. The cover features a raised black star emblem and intricate blue patterns.
description_view_0: Front cover view showing the central black star emblem, blue geometric designs, and two brown leather straps on the right edge.
description_view_1: Top view displaying the tan pages, black metal corner protectors, and a blue star motif on the spine.
description_view_2: Back cover view, nearly identical to the front, with the same blue geometric designs and black star emblem, but without the visible straps.
description_view_3: Spine view highlighting the three brown leather straps with blue circular motifs and the black metal corner protectors.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a large, raised black star-shaped emblem at the center, surrounded by symmetrical blue geometric patterns resembling arcane or magical symbols. The design is bold and decorative, with no figurative imagery or scenes.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is brown with three horizontal leather straps, each decorated with a blue circular motif. No text is visible, and the design is purely ornamental.
